# Part 3: [TODO: Tên đề tài] — Bộ dữ liệu tự chọn

```{r p3-setup, include=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
source(here::here("config", "setup.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center")
```

```{r p3-setup-opts, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(car)
library(corrplot)
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","output","Part_1_FreeChoi_123.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","output","Part_2_FreeChoi_4.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","output","Part_3_FreeChoi_5.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_3_FreeChoice","output","Part_4_FreeChoi_6.Rmd")}
```
